secondary_diagnostics_text:
missing_helper_definition (legal-effect context=True):
  helper: satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_residence (signature=Person -> Bool; kind=unknown; hints=unknown)
  repair: define 'satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_residence' in THEN with rules, or reclassify as case_input/background only if safe; do not rename without defining.
  - rules[2].if negated
  threshold helper candidates:
    - objective_criterion_established (helper)
    - absconding_criterion_1_met (helper)
    - absconding_criterion_2_met (helper)
    - absconding_criterion_3_met (helper)
    - absconding_criterion_4_met (helper)
    - absconding_criterion_5_met (helper)
  other lower-level symbols:
    - no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay (observable)
    - is_in_illegal_residence (derived)
    - subject_to_relevant_procedure (helper)
    - objective_criterion_established (helper)
    - absconding_criterion_1_met (helper)
    - absconding_criterion_2_met (helper)
    - absconding_criterion_3_met (helper)
    - absconding_criterion_4_met (helper)
